title: ProcessDefinition
description: Protocol-owned authoritative executable workflow-graph surface with explicit deterministic gate planning.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for process definition objects.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this process definition.

process_id.description: Stable authoritative process identity whose executable graph is compiled into run plans.

executor_bindings.description: Authoritative executor bindings available to process gate definitions.

binding_id.description: Stable binding identity referenced by planned gate entries.

executor_id.description: Trusted executor registry identity bound for dispatch and policy validation.

executor_class.description: Execution risk class expected by policy for this binding.

allowed_role_kinds.description: Role kinds allowed to dispatch this executor binding.

items.description: One allowed role kind for this binding.

description.description: Optional human-facing summary for operator diagnostics.

gate_definitions.description: Authoritative gate ordering and checkpoint placement for process execution planning.

dependency_edges.description: Explicit typed dependency edges over stable step identities; must form a DAG in trusted compilation.

upstream_step_id.description: Step identity that must complete first.

downstream_step_id.description: Dependent step identity blocked on upstream completion.

dependency_kind.description: Typed control-flow dependency semantics for v0 DAG planning.
